mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_nickname_profile (user_id, nickname, avatar_file_id, bio, is_default, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{nickname}, #{avatarFileId}, #{bio}, #{isDefault}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user_nickname_profile WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY is_default DESC, created_at ASC, id ASC
SELECT * FROM user_nickname_profile WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY is_default DESC, created_at ASC, id ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT * FROM user_nickname_profile WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' AND id IN
#{id}

SELECT id AS userId, name AS name, status AS status FROM users WHERE id IN
#{uid}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_nickname_profile WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.update: UPDATE user_nickname_profile SET is_default = 0 WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO conversation_member_profile (conversation_id, user_id, nickname_profile_id, anonymous) VALUES (#{conversationId}, #{userId}, #{nicknameProfileId}, #{anonymous}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE nickname_profile_id = VALUES(nickname_profile_id), anonymous = VALUES(anonymous), updated_at = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT name FROM users WHERE id = #{userId}
SELECT status FROM users WHERE id = #{userId}
